name: Chicken Tetrazzine
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a large pan.
2. Add mushrooms and onion and sauté for 6-7 minutes or until liquid evaporates.
3. Stir in flour.
4. Gradually add chicken broth, skim milk, and light process cream cheese. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in 1/2 cup Parmesan cheese and the next 5 ingredients. Set aside.
6. Cook spaghetti according to package directions after breaking into 4-inch pieces. Omit salt and oil from the pot.
7. Stir spaghetti and chicken into mushroom mixture.
8. Spoon into a deep 3-quart casserole coated with cooking spray.
9. Sprinkle with remaining Parmesan cheese.
10. Cover casserole and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
11. Uncover and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes more.
12. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
